pom.xml.general_idea: Update Jackson core, databind, and annotations to a newer version compatible with the new stack.
Update SLF4J API and simple binding to version 2.0.12 for better logging support.
Update Wiremock test dependency to version 2.26.3 for improved HTTP mocking capabilities.
Update JUnit 4 dependency to version 4.13.1 to fix known vulnerabilities and bugs.
Remove Mockito core dependency as it is no longer used in the test suite.
Move Maven plugin versions to properties for easier maintenance and consistency.
Replace the failing javadoc plugin with a jar plugin execution that creates an empty javadoc jar to satisfy Sonatype requirements.
Enable resource filtering for main resources to allow property substitution during build.
Change the maven-source-plugin goal from jar-no-fork to jar for standard source attachment.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven release plugin temporary files to .gitignore to prevent committing build artifacts.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add pagination logic to fetch organizations in batches to handle large result sets.
Replace UriComponentsBuilder with manual string concatenation and formUrlEncode for query parameters.
Move header setting from HttpEntity to Ktor's request builder block.
Update logger initialization to use the new class context instead of the old error handler class.
Extract magic strings and numbers into named constants for better maintainability.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: const val DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 500; const val CORRELATION_ID_HEADER_NAME = "X-Correlation-ID"

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add @JvmOverloads annotation to allow Java callers to omit default arguments.
Make AltinnConfig optional by setting it to nullable with a null default value.
Make ProxyConfig consumerId nullable to handle cases where it might be missing.
Introduce a common Token interface to unify token handling types.
Define a specific data class for self-service tokens implementing the Token interface.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: data class SelvbetjeningToken(override val value: String): Token

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Define a specific data class for token-to-token scenarios implementing the Token interface.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: data class TokenXToken(override val value: String): Token

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add a data class to represent a subject value.
Rename AltinnOrganisasjon to AltinnReportee to better reflect that it can represent both organizations and individuals.
Add socialSecurityNumber field to support individual reportees in addition to organizations.
Refactor the utility class into top-level functions and constants to align with modern Kotlin idioms.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Removed `class CorrelationIdUtils` and `companion object`, moving `getCorrelationId` and constants to file scope.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Introduce a helper function to safely scope MDC context for a specific action.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Added `private fun <T> runWithMDC(key: String, value: String, action: () -> T): T`.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Expand correlation ID resolution to check multiple standard MDC keys before generating a new UUID.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Added `private fun hentKorrelasjonFraKjenteMDCKeys()` checking keys like 'X-Request-ID' and 'callId'.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add a function to execute actions with guaranteed correlation ID context propagation.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: Added `fun <T> withCorrelationId(action: () -> T): T` which uses `runWithMDC` if ID is missing.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Simplify the getter to only retrieve the specific MDC key, delegating generation logic elsewhere.

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove @RunWith(MockitoJUnitRunner::class) annotation as the test no longer uses Mockito mocks.
Remove manual RestTemplate and RestTemplateBuilder mocking logic that is no longer needed.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl:
-val restTemplate: RestTemplate = RestTemplate()
-    private val restTemplateBuilder = object: RestTemplateBuilder() { ... }

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove OIDCRequestContextHolder mocking and JWT token generation setup.
Simplify AltinnrettigheterProxyKlient initialization by removing context dependencies.
Replace OIDC context setup in @Before with WireMock reset.
Update imports to use specific WireMock methods and new utility classes.
Add new integration tests for hentOrganisasjoner with various parameters and pagination scenarios.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl:
+    @Test
+    fun `hentOrganisasjoner() kaller AltinnrettigheterProxy med riktige parametre...`

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace inline WireMock stubbing with utility functions for cleaner test code.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: +        wireMockServer.stubFor(`altinn-rettigheter-proxy returnerer 200 OK og en liste med AltinnReportees`(...))

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace inline WireMock verification with utility functions.
Add tests for pagination scenarios where multiple API calls are needed.

+    fun `hentOrganisasjoner() kaller AltinnrettigheterProxy flere ganger hvis bruker har tilgang til flere enn 499 virksomheter`

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add test for handling person responses in bankruptcy scenarios.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl:
+    @Test
+    fun `hentOrganisasjoner() takler respons som er person pga konkurs`

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update companion object to add selvbetjeningToken and adjust WireMock configuration.
